title: Why Choose VibeChat Over Omegle in 2026?
description: Legacy random chat sites are disappearing for a reason. Here's why VibeChat's architecture is the safer, more modern alternative.
author: Vibe Team
content:
For over a decade, Omegle reigned as the king of random video chat. But as we've seen, its legacy architecture was plagued by moderation failures and data privacy concerns. VibeChat was born from the idea that social discovery doesn't have to be dangerous.

### 1. Edge-AI Moderation
Unlike legacy sites that either had no moderation or sent your video feed to server-side AI, VibeChat performs NSFW detection locally on your device. This means your private moments stay private until the AI is 100% sure a violation has occurred.

### 2. Peer-to-Peer Stability
We use advanced WebRTC protocols to ensure that your video connection is as direct as possible. This minimizes latency and ensures that we, the platform, never act as a 'man-in-the-middle' for your conversations.

### 3. Social Persistence
The 'Omegle' problem was that you'd have an amazing conversation and lose them the second they clicked 'Next'. VibeChat allows you to add friends, send DMs, and build a lasting vibe.
